loc-dot: position: absolute; top: 58%; left: 32%; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--blue); border: 3px solid #fff; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); z-index: 3;
search-avatar: width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E8B572, #C26B27); flex-shrink: 0; color: #fff; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
grabber: width: 32px; height: 4px; background: var(--divider); border-radius: 2px; margin: 0 auto 10px;
place-photo: width: 52px; height: 52px; border-radius: 8px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D4A373, #976D42); flex-shrink: 0; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
place-rating: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px;
sheet-btn: flex: 1; height: 34px; border-radius: 17px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 4px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 500;
